step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a matte black ribbed seamless sports bra with thin straps, matching high-waist seamless black leggings, low-cut black ankle socks just visible above the leggings, no shoes, hair pulled into a slick high ponytail with a few face-framing pieces left out, small gold huggie hoops, minimal no-makeup makeup with a touch of gloss. She stands in a modern commercial gym facing a large floor-to-ceiling mirror wall, treadmills and cable machines softly out of focus behind her, large windows in the background letting in late-afternoon golden-hour light, polished concrete floor. Standing at a slight three-quarter angle to the mirror, weight on her right hip, left foot slightly forward, soft confident smile. Both hands are visible in the frame, not in her pockets, not behind her back, not cropped out of frame. Her left hand is raised at face level holding a phone capturing the mirror reflection. Her right hand rests at her side, fingers relaxed and open. Mixed gym lighting — cool overhead fluorescents combined with warm window backlight from late-afternoon sun streaming in behind her, subtle rim light on her shoulders and hair. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro front camera. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Post-workout earned, slightly winded, composed mood, palette of bone white, concrete grey, warm window glow, charcoal black. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, extra fingers, fused fingers, distorted face, asymmetric eyes, unnatural skin texture, plastic skin, AI-generated look, model pose, perfect symmetry, smooth airbrushed skin, glossy plastic skin, illustration, 3D render, CGI, doll-like features, magazine retouching

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: Right hand at upper-chest level, thumb on the front face of the box near the top edge, index and middle fingers on the back of the box, ring and pinky tucked under, box angled forty-five degrees toward the mirror so the front face is clearly visible in the reflection.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will adjust her right arm to bring the right hand up from her side to upper-chest level holding the Alluvi box, angled toward the mirror so the front face shows clearly in the mirror reflection. The left hand and phone position remain unchanged.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: id_weight at fal API cap (1.0). true_cfg at default 1.5 — medium-full mid-thigh-up framing where face is mid-importance and the mirror reflection doubles the visibility of identity, default is sufficient alongside the major outfit override from the white reference to matte black.
